title: AccountBalanceResult (v1)
description: Relay's response shape for GET /api/v1/agents/{motebitId}/balance — the market-v1 §2 virtual-account state in decimal USD, with the §2.7 transaction audit rows. See spec/market-v1.md §2.6.

pending_withdrawals.description: Decimal USD locked in not-yet-fired withdrawal requests.

pending_allocations.description: Decimal USD locked in active budget allocations (market-v1 §4).

dispute_window_hold.description: Decimal USD held back by the dispute window (settlement-v1).

available_for_withdrawal.description: Decimal USD the relay would actually release on requestWithdrawal now.

sweep_threshold.description: Operator sweep threshold in decimal USD; null when unset.

settlement_address.description: Agent's declared settlement address; null when undeclared.

type.description: One of the market-v1 §2.2 transaction types (deposit, withdrawal, allocation_hold, allocation_release, settlement_debit, settlement_credit, fee, waiver). Readers MUST tolerate unknown values — the vocabulary evolves additively.

amount.description: Signed decimal USD. Credits positive, debits negative.

balance_after.description: Decimal USD balance after this transaction was applied.

reference_id.description: External correlation id (deposit tx hash, allocation id, …); null when none.

transactions.description: Most recent transactions, newest first; the reference relay caps at 50.
